variants.setup:
mkdir -p /tmp/eval_vowels && printf 'Hello World
AEIOU
xyz

Programming is fun
' > /tmp/eval_vowels/input.txt && printf '3
5
0
0
5
' > /tmp/eval_vowels/expected.txt
variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_vowels/vowels.py — a Python program that reads lines from stdin and for each line writes the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u — both cases) on its own line to stdout. Empty lines yield 0.

validation.script: set -e; cd /tmp/eval_vowels && python3 vowels.py < input.txt > out.txt && diff -u expected.txt out.txt && echo OK

variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_vowels/vowels.go (package main) that reads lines from stdin and for each line writes the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u — both cases) on its own line to stdout. Empty lines yield 0. Compile with `go build -o vowels vowels.go`.

validation.script: set -e; cd /tmp/eval_vowels && go build -o vowels vowels.go && ./vowels < input.txt > out.txt && diff -u expected.txt out.txt && echo OK

variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_vowels/vowels.c — a C program that reads lines from stdin and for each line writes the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u — both cases) on its own line to stdout. Empty lines yield 0. Must compile cleanly with `gcc -O2 -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -o vowels vowels.c`.

validation.script: set -e; cd /tmp/eval_vowels && gcc -O2 -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -o vowels vowels.c && ./vowels < input.txt > out.txt && diff -u expected.txt out.txt && echo OK

variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_vowels/vowels.cpp — a C++ program that reads lines from stdin and for each line writes the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u — both cases) on its own line to stdout. Empty lines yield 0. Must compile cleanly with `g++ -O2 -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -o vowels vowels.cpp`.

validation.script: set -e; cd /tmp/eval_vowels && g++ -O2 -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -o vowels vowels.cpp && ./vowels < input.txt > out.txt && diff -u expected.txt out.txt && echo OK
